chinese_text: 雞既鳴矣，朝既盈矣。匪雞則鳴，蒼蠅之聲。
東方明矣，朝既昌矣。匪東方則明，月出之光。
translation_text:
The east is bright;
The court is crowded
But it was not the east that was bright; —
It was the light of the moon coming forth.
translation_text_raw:
The east is bright;
The court is crowded
But it was not the east that was bright; —
It was the light of the moon coming forth.

chinese_text: 蟲飛薨薨，甘與子同夢。會且歸矣，無庶予子憎！
